steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The Dreadnought and Royal George both have three decks, but only the Royal George is ranked first-rate.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D captures the logical conclusion: having three decks is not sufficient for first-rate ranking.

Choices A, B, and C either misstate the Dreadnought's crew size, contradict the evidence with the Dreadnought, or speculate about operational needs not in the passage.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
